tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"show ip access-lists CP_ICMP
show policy-map PM_CP
show class-map CM_CP_ICMP
show control-plane
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show ip access-lists CP_ICMP
Extended IP access list CP_ICMP
    10 permit icmp any any
Switch#show policy-map PM_CP
  Policy Map PM_CP
    Class CM_CP_ICMP
     police cir 8000 bc 8000
       conform-action transmit 
       exceed-action drop 
    Class class-default
Switch#show class-map CM_CP_ICMP
 Class Map match-any CM_CP_ICMP (id 1)
   Match access-group name CP_ICMP

Switch#show control-plane
                   ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch#
Switch#
Switch#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"end
config firewall address
delete "WAN-ICMP-Targets"
end
show firewall address
show firewall service custom
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # delete "WAN-ICMP-Targets"
delete table entry WAN-ICMP-Targets unset oper error ret=1
Command fail. Return code 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address

end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
 set name "Deny-ICMP-Egress-From-Host"
 set srcintf "port2"
 set dstintf "port1"
 set srcaddr "Compromised-192.168.1.3"
 set dstaddr "all"
 set action deny
 set service "ALL_ICMP"
 set schedule "always"
 set logtraffic all
 set status enable
next
end
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set name "Deny-ICMP-Egress-From-Host"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set srcaddr "Compromised-192.168.1.3"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set service "ALL_ICMP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #  set status enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
